Configuration and initialization files for various Pebble firmware boards, including Asterix, BB2, EV2.4, Robert, Silk, Snowy, Spalding EVT, and versions 1.5 and 2.0.


## Files
- **[board_asterix.c](board_asterix.c.md)**: Configuration and initialization of peripherals for the Asterix board, including QSPI, UART, I2C, and PWM.
- **[board_asterix.h](board_asterix.h.md)**: Configuration settings and hardware interface definitions for the Asterix board in the Pebble firmware.
- **[board_bb2.c](board_bb2.c.md)**: Configuration and initialization of DMA, UART, I2C, and voltage monitor devices for the board.
- **[board_bb2.h](board_bb2.h.md)**: Configuration settings and definitions for the BB2 board in the Pebble firmware.
- **[board_ev2_4.c](board_ev2_4.c.md)**: Configuration and initialization of DMA, UART, I2C, and voltage monitor devices for the board.
- **[board_ev2_4.h](board_ev2_4.h.md)**: Configuration settings and hardware interface definitions for the EV2.4 board in the Pebble firmware.
- **[board_robert.c](board_robert.c.md)**: Configuration and initialization of DMA, UART, I2C, SPI, and QSPI devices for the Robert board in the Pebble firmware.
- **[board_robert.h](board_robert.h.md)**: Board configuration definitions for various Robert and Cutts board models, including GPIO, power, and sensor settings.
- **[board_silk.c](board_silk.c.md)**: Configuration and initialization of DMA, UART, I2C, SPI, HRM, and QSPI devices for the board.
- **[board_silk.h](board_silk.h.md)**: Configuration settings and hardware interface definitions for the Pebble smartwatch board.
- **[board_snowy.c](board_snowy.c.md)**: Configures DMA, UART, I2C, SPI, and voltage monitoring for the Snowy board in the Pebble firmware.
- **[board_snowy.h](board_snowy.h.md)**: Board configuration definitions for Snowy EVT2 and similar boards, including mic, power, and sensor settings.
- **[board_spalding_evt.c](board_spalding_evt.c.md)**: Configures DMA, UART, I2C, SPI, and voltage monitoring for the Spalding EVT board in the Pebble firmware.
- **[board_spalding_evt.h](board_spalding_evt.h.md)**: Board configuration definitions for the Spalding EVT, including mic, power, buttons, and sensors.
- **[board_v1_5.c](board_v1_5.c.md)**: Configuration and initialization of DMA, UART, I2C, and voltage monitor devices for board version 1.5.
- **[board_v1_5.h](board_v1_5.h.md)**: Configuration and definitions for Pebble board version 1.5, including peripherals and power management.
- **[board_v2_0.c](board_v2_0.c.md)**: Initializes DMA, UART, I2C, and voltage monitor devices for the board version 2.0.
- **[board_v2_0.h](board_v2_0.h.md)**: Configuration settings and definitions for Pebble board version 2.0, including peripherals and interfaces.
